data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not confirm that the requirement for checkpoint-by-checklist completion (tires, brakes, lights, horn) is satisfied. While there is a scenario involving a forklift inspection, it does not encompass the broader requirement for multiple equipment types or the necessary checkpoints. Specifically, the evidence lacks details on the completion of all required checkpoints for the specified items, leading to a clear gap in validation.
gaps: No evidence of checkpoint completion for all required items (tires, brakes, lights, horn) across multiple equipment types.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add detailed inspection evidence for all equipment types
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete evidence of checkpoint completion for all required items across different equipment types.
